_readme: Extra one-liner notes appended to a station's ramblerNote AFTER the auto-generated walk summaries. Keyed by coordKey ('lng,lat'). Each value is an array of strings; each string becomes its own paragraph separated by a blank line. Editable by hand — survives re-runs of build-rambler-notes.mjs (which reads this file in addition to the walks data).
-0.0178578,51.1264031: **[Forest Row Circular extension](https://www.walkingclub.org.uk/walk/forest-row-circular/)**: a one-way walk back to East Grinstead from the Forest Row Circular walk — bus to Forest Row from East Grinstead, then walk back via the main route plus a 5.5 km extension.
-0.1990432,51.4340563: **Wimbledon Park extension of the [Wimbledon Circular](https://www.walkingclub.org.uk/walk/wimbledon-circular/)**: a longer finish via Wimbledon Park.
0.0043201,51.500574: **North Greenwich extension of the [London Bridge to Greenwich via the South Bank](https://www.walkingclub.org.uk/walk/london-bridge-to-greenwich-via-the-south-bank/)** walk — the longer finish walks on ~2 miles past Greenwich to reach North Greenwich (Jubilee line).
1.2916476,52.9300536: **[Hunstanton to Cromer](https://www.walkingclub.org.uk/walk/hunstanton-to-cromer/)**: a long-distance coastal walk ending at Cromer (starts at Hunstanton — bus from King's Lynn). Check tide timings. Beach route past the breached RSPB Titchwell site may be impassable at certain tides — check current passability.
-0.5419326,50.8966534: **[Steyning to Cocking](https://www.walkingclub.org.uk/walk/steyning-to-cocking/)**: a long South Downs traverse with two Amberley-based variants — start at Amberley walking west to Cocking (bus to return), or walk east from Steyning (bus from Shoreham-by-Sea) to finish at Amberley.
-2.4374501,50.7091366: **[Dorchester to Abbotsbury](https://www.walkingclub.org.uk/walk/osmington-or-dorchester-to-abbotsbury/)**: a linear walk from Dorchester South to Abbotsbury (bus return). Part of a longer Osmington-to-Abbotsbury walk.
